name: cavern
hints: A cavern with a crack in the rock, a gem, the villain ULTRON, and a small cage. Be careful with ULTRON.
GET GEM. The crack in the rock may lead somewhere. ULTRON is dangerous - you may need Hulk strength to deal with him. The cage may hold something.
GET GEM (treasure). Examine the crack - GO CRACK may lead to new areas. ULTRON is a Marvel villain who may attack. HIT ULTRON as the Hulk to defeat him. The cage may contain an ally.
Collect the gem. Deal with ULTRON using Hulk strength (HIT ULTRON). Explore the crack in the rock. OPEN CAGE or look inside it for items or allies.
notes: Underground cavern with *Gem* treasure, crack in rock, ULTRON (Marvel villain), and a small cage. ULTRON may need to be defeated with Hulk strength. The cage may contain Ant-Man or another ally. Crack in rock may lead to new areas. No standard exits - reached through digging.
